name: Dusty Rose Embroidered Lehenga
description: A dusty rose net lehenga with heavy zardozi and sequin work, giving off a royal and soft vibe.
stylistNotes: Ideal for evening weddings with gold accessories.
materialCare: Dry clean only. Store in muslin cloth.

name: Floral Blush Pink Embroidered Lehenga
description: Soft blush pink lehenga with multicolor thread floral embroidery and a net dupatta.
stylistNotes: Pair with minimal jewelry for a day function.

name: Lotus Motif Crystal Embroidered Lehenga
description: Dramatic lehenga with lotus motifs and heavy crystal embellishments in blush and red tones.
stylistNotes: Statement piece for a glamorous bridal entry.
materialCare: Handle with care. Dry clean and air occasionally.

name: Royal Maroon and Beige Velvet Lehenga
description: Luxurious maroon velvet lehenga with antique beige embroidery and rich borders.
stylistNotes: A timeless piece for classic brides.
materialCare: Keep away from moisture. Dry clean only.

name: Teal & Pink Floral Organza Lehenga
description: Vibrant teal lehenga with large pink floral motifs, highlighted with sequins and golden accents.
stylistNotes: Perfect for a mehendi or outdoor sangeet.
materialCare: Dry clean only. Avoid folding embroidery areas.
